codeReview.summary: Created tests/devin-agent.test.ts with 17 well-structured tests across 4 describe blocks. Coverage is thorough: (1) Config fields — name, displayName, skillsDir, globalSkillsDir, detectInstalled function type, getAgentConfig access, no platform-specific paths. (2) Detection — both branches (configHome/devin exists vs not) using vi.hoisted + vi.mock for fs.existsSync with proper beforeEach reset. (3) Non-universal classification — isUniversalAgent(false), getNonUniversalAgents(includes), getUniversalAgents(excludes). (4) Uniqueness — key, displayName, skillsDir, globalSkillsDir all verified unique across all agents. The mock pattern (vi.hoisted before imports) is the correct Vitest approach. configHome derivation in the test correctly mirrors the source code. validate-agents.ts confirmed passing.

summary: Comprehensive test suite. 17 tests covering all validation contract assertions for this milestone. Fulfills VAL-REG-006. No issues.
